=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
BOB DYLAN
Another Night At Wolftrap

*******Official release removed*********************************************************
COCAINE BLUES released on TELL TALE SIGNS: THE BOOTLEG SERIES VOL. 8 RARE AND UNRELEASED 1989-2006
****************************************************************************************

Wolftrap, Vienna, VA, August 24, 1997
Excellent mono soundboard remastered by Captain Acid and Pink Robert
Pink Acid Project

Disc 1:
1. Absolutely Sweet Marie
2. Tonight I'll Be Staying Here With You
3. Tough Mama
4. You Ain't Going Nowhere
5. Silvio
6. Roving Gambler
7. Tangled Up In Blue
8. Cocaine Blues (removed)

Disc 2:
1. Watching The River Flow
2. Blind Willie McTell
3. Highway 61 Revisited
4. Like A Rolling Stone
5. Forever Young
6. Rainy Day Women #12 & 35
